name: Bikini Barbershop
overview: Bikini Barbershop is an American reality show on AXS TV featuring Jeff Wulkan, a man who runs a hair salon/barber shop in Long Branch, New Jersey called "Bikini Barbers". It mainly consists of female hair stylists, at work, wearing only bikinis.

trailers.title: Bikini Barbershop: 101 Open For Business - Girls, Girls, Girls
